serviceArea: Based in Fort Smith/Fayetteville, AR · Serving travelers worldwide
name: Travel Helpers
motto: Don't let getting there keep you from going.
tagline: Don't let getting there keep you from going.

founder.name: Cyndi Glidewell
founder.credentials: BSN, BS, Author, "The Red Hat Society Travel Guide",  Certified Travel Advisor
founder.title: Founder, Author

description: Travel Helpers provides professional travel coordination, VIP executive concierge services, and assisted travel companion support. From high-discretion travel coordination and luxury vacations to dedicated companion assistance for seniors, families, and travelers with medical or mobility needs, we ensure every journey is seamless and stress-free.
